title: Marco DeepResearch: Unlocking Efficient Deep Research Agents via Verification-Centric Design

defines.name: Marco DeepResearch
defines.definition: A verification-centric deep research agent that improves data synthesis, trajectory construction, and test-time scaling to better solve long-horizon search and reasoning tasks.

problem: Existing deep research agents lack explicit verification in data synthesis, trajectory construction, and inference, causing error propagation and poor performance on long-horizon tasks.
